About me

Who I Am

"Passionate about turning data into decisions and code into experiences."

I'm Anshul Jain, a Computer Science student at Lovely Professional University with a deep interest in mobile development and data analytics. I enjoy building things that matter — from weather apps that adapt to the user's environment, to BI dashboards that unlock business insights.

When I'm not coding, I'm exploring the world of Generative AI, participating in cybersecurity events, and sharpening my problem-solving skills through real-world projects.

📍 Jaipur, Rajasthan 🎓 B.Tech CSE 📱 Android Dev 📊 Data Analytics 🤖 AI Enthusiast
